3103650.name: Project Stack
3103650.description:
Begin your experience in Project Stack on a small, floating island. Collect and sell fruit to earn money, which you can use to buy more land to expand your island. Your goal is to fulfill a quota of 1,124,240 bits.

Purchase tools and upgrades to gather larger stacks of fruit and increase your productivity. Be careful with rotting fruit, if left unchecked, it can spoil your stacks and set you back.

Find unique elemental fruits that interact with each other in interesting ways. Watch as your island changes and develops throughout Project Stack.
3103650.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
